title: Image To Image Travel Photo Handwritten Annotation AI
sourceTitle: Image To Image Travel Photo Handwritten Annotation AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image handwritten annotation overlay for an uploaded fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt, preserving the original travel photo exactly. Subject: 。 supplies the swappable subject detail for this template. The uploaded fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt remains unchanged; only white arrows, soft circles, underlines, tiny stars, small hearts and short handwritten Chinese notes from fixed source composition, crop, hierarchy, and layout rule from the prompt are added as casual friend-circle annotations. Scene: 请基于我上传的旅行照片进行编辑。 provides the visible environment while the fixed composition and visual style remain intact. Original travel landmark, people, buildings, lights, water, sky, and composition are preserved, with white and soft pastel hand-drawn lines placed lightly over open areas. Composition: Keep the original photo composition fixed; add arrows, circles, underlines, stars, hearts, and small doodles around visible details without covering the main subject or important scenery. Signature Elements: Uploaded fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt, fixed source composition, crop, hierarchy, and layout rule from the prompt, white arrows, soft circles, underlines, tiny stars, small hearts, white hand-drawn arrows, circles, underlines, stars, hearts, and preserved authentic travel-photo base. Fixed source details: Source Travel Photo: evening city waterfront travel photo; Annotation Phrases: 这里好美, 水面倒影, 灯光好温柔, 晚风很舒服. Style: Relaxed handwritten travel-photo markup, like a friend personally annotated the picture before sharing, natural, light, non-commercial, and not poster-like. Color Palette: Original photo colors remain unchanged; annotations use white plus soft pale colors, gentle strokes, and readable casual handwriting. Lighting: Original lighting stays intact; annotation strokes sit as flat overlay marks without changing the photo light or shadows. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: keep annotations light and readable; and preserve the uploaded photo as the base image.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
